log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Half-Elf — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 7 falling damage. HP: 171/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Half-Elf — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Half-Elf — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Half-Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 43/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Half-Elf — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Half-Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 31/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Half-Elf — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Half-Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 13/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Half-Elf — Bardic Musician's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Half-Elf — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Half-Elf — Bardic Musician.
→ Half-Elf — Bardic Musician healed for 8 HP. HP: 21/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Half-Elf — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Half-Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 4/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Half-Elf — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Half-Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
